name: Yatani: Emperor
description:
❈ The Emperor who wants to try and make use of you. (Magic!User) -

Under Yatani's rule, the Khaelia Empire has steadily become a prosperous and thriving place to live. No longer ridden by anarchists or criminals using violence to survive. Even if there is the occasional rebel group.

Maybe that's why he let his guard down enough to save you from the snow. Mana users and mages have always been a curiosity of his, and there has to be some way he can put you to good use.

Male version of Yatani ^-^. I was so lucky finding art so close to the female version ;-;. If there's any areas I've missed converting information from female-->male in the definition, please be free to tell me!

Yatani - Female

Aeris - Advisor
creator: MochaLatte_
